A_basic_context_identifiers.branch_location: Silver Spring, Maryland at 8000 Georgia Ave
A_basic_context_identifiers.conversation_summary: Jackie from Hertz contacted the customer, Jose, to complete a rental reservation authorized by State Farm. Jose needed language assistance, leading to a translator being involved. The customer recently had a car accident, was hospitalized, and uncertain about when he would need the rental since he’s unsure about returning to work. His car hadn’t been sent to a repair shop yet. The call concluded with Hertz suggesting that once Jose is ready, he can schedule the rental pickup directly with the branch.

B_call_type_flow.call_type_description: Parked, waiting on the third party
decision_points: Providing customer details including vehicle information
Discussion of accident and current hospital situation
Suggestion to schedule rental at a later time

C_time_feasibility.customer_stated_timing_need: Undetermined due to being hospitalized after an accident.

E_fleet_vehicle_availability.hard_constraint_details: The customer was hospitalized following an accident.

customer_post_call_actions: Decide on the timing for rental.
Contact the branch to schedule rental pickup.
K_outcome_customer_effort.effort_burden_explanation: The customer has to manage hospital recovery, timing uncertainty, and logistics with the branch later.
